modelName: Made to Last Stainless Steel Stockpot & Steamer Set 24cm
description: This professional-grade set features a robust 24cm stockpot crafted from high-quality stainless steel, designed for durability and longevity in busy kitchens. Included in this specific variant is the 24cm stockpot, a perfectly fitting 24cm steamer insert, and a toughened glass lid, allowing for versatile cooking methods from boiling to healthy steaming. The set boasts a thick encapsulated base for even heat distribution and is fully compatible with all hobs, including induction. Riveted stainless steel handles ensure a secure, comfortable grip for safe handling.
features: Construction: Stainless steel body with induction-suitable friction-bonded base. Capacity: High-volume cylindrical profile. Thermal Tolerance: Oven safe up to 180°C (350°F/Gas Mark 4). Lid: Toughened glass with steam vent and stainless steel rim. Handles: Securely riveted stainless steel side handles.
uses: Boiling stocks and broths, steaming vegetables or fish, cooking pasta, blanching large quantities of ingredients.

accessories.name: 24cm Stockpot Base
accessories.description: Main stainless steel vessel for boiling and simmering.

accessories.name: Multi-Steamer Insert
accessories.description: Perforated stainless steel insert that fits atop the stockpot for steaming.

accessories.name: Toughened Glass Lid
accessories.description: See-through lid with steam vent, fits both the stockpot and steamer insert.

name: Prestige Made to Last Stainless Steel Stockpot & Steamer Set 24cm
